overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Horizon game showing the protagonist exploring a coastal tribal settlement at sunset. The character walks along wooden docks past palm trees and cliffside buildings, passes through a monumental stone gate, and emerges onto a misty pier extending over calm waters.

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks steadily along the wooden dock through the settlement, passing palm trees and wooden structures

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank walkway forming the main path through the settlement
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
multi-level wooden structure built into the rocky cliff face
simple wooden fence along the right edge of the walkway
calm water visible between the walkway and distant structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden walkway in a tropical tribal settlement during golden hour. The character walks forward past palm trees on the left and wooden railings on the right, with large cliffside buildings visible ahead. The atmosphere is warm and tranquil with long shadows cast by the setting sun.

events.description: character turns right to follow the riverside path toward the stone gate
bright sun flare appears as the character approaches the gate structure

agents.ego_description: Aloy turns right and continues along the waterfront walkway, approaching a large stone gate

entered.detail: large monumental stone archway with hanging lanterns marking the settlement exit
circular wooden hut with conical roof beside the path
distant mountains visible beyond the settlement
two-story wooden structure with external staircase

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a riverside walkway that opens up to reveal a wider view of the water and distant mountains. The path leads toward an impressive stone gate structure. A bright sun flare occurs as the camera faces the setting sun, illuminating the wooden buildings on the left.

events.description: entering the covered stone gate structure with hanging lanterns
exiting the shadowed gate into the brighter waterfront area

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks up stone steps and passes through the large gate structure, transitioning from the settlement to the waterfront

notable_agents.action: distant figure visible through the gate archway standing on the pier ahead

entered.detail: massive stone gate structure with carved details and wooden reinforcements
lit lanterns suspended from the gate ceiling
calm water with low mist visible through the gate exit

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stone steps into a monumental stone gate that serves as the settlement's exit. The interior is shadowed with hanging lanterns providing warm light. Passing through the archway, the scene transitions to reveal a misty waterfront pier extending over calm waters, with a distant figure visible at the end of the pier.

events.description: emerging from gate onto open pier extending over the water

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks along the wooden pier extending over the misty water, approaching the end with panoramic views

entered.detail: rocky cliff formations rising from the misty water in the distance
thick wooden posts marking the sides of the pier
red rock outcrops visible through the mist across the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a serene waterfront scene as the character walks along a wooden pier extending over calm, misty waters. The sun sets behind, casting a warm glow and creating silhouettes. Distant rocky cliffs emerge from the mist, and the pier posts frame the view as the character reaches the end of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tropical tribal settlement that transitions from a warm, enclosed village into a vast, misty waterfront. It begins on a wooden walkway lined with palm trees and cliffside buildings, moving forward through the tranquil golden hour light. As the character turns right toward a riverside path, the view expands to reveal distant mountains and a bright sun flare that illuminates the surrounding wooden structures. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends stone steps and passes through a shadowed, lantern-lit monumental gate, emerging from the archway into a serene, fog-covered pier. Finally, the camera glides over calm waters toward a distant figure, with the setting sun casting long silhouettes against rocky cliffs emerging from the mist.
